text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
choice_data_list: Your nose is bleeding! Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sorry... It doesn't look like it's going to stop
anytime soon...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I was getting myself fired up for training, but my
cheer ended up going, "Ei, ei, blwargh!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea why my nose is bleeding, though. I
didn't even bump into anything today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The exhaustion from running so many consecutive
races may be catching up with her. Looks like I
need to rethink her schedule.
